title: Upscale at monday.com Elevate 2024: highlights, insights, and what's next!
excerpt:

posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
Read our most recent blog post to look back at some of the standout moments, key insights, and what this all means for the future of work for monday.com users and beyond!

For the very first time, live and in as many colours as a fully populated monday.com board, we had the opportunity to showcase our suite of apps—Unlimited Subitems, Recurring Tasks, Smart Forms, and Integrate Plus for Slack—and engage with members of the monday.com community to better understand the opportunities and challenges of modern project management and new ways of working.

But Elevate wasn’t just about showing off our shiny new tools; it was about sparking meaningful conversations, solving real-world problems, and catching a glimpse of the trends shaping the future of work. From AI-driven automation to more advanced cross-platform integrations, Elevate 2024 offered insights that every monday.com user can benefit from.

Screenshot 2024-10-02 at 17.27.431490×774 115 KB
